rules.name: Paper Reorder Level
rules.recommendation: Paper stock is running low (<= 5 packs). Order at least 15 packs of A4 paper immediately to avoid queue delays.

rules.name: Toner Cartridge Safety Stock
rules.recommendation: Spare toner cartridges are below safety stock (<= 2 cartridges). Order replacement cartridges to prevent downtime.

rules.name: Estimated Stock Runout Speed
rules.recommendation: Based on weekly print volume, current paper stock will run out in less than 7 days. Replenish inventory.
